description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a light-colored wooden top and darker wooden sides and back. The soundhole is round and centrally located, bordered by a simple rosette. The bridge is rectangular and dark, with visible bridge pins and a white saddle. The neck is long and slender, leading to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged three on each side. The fretboard is dark and features visible frets, while the headstock is slightly angled and lacks any visible branding or ornamentation. The overall finish is smooth and semi-glossy, highlighting the natural wood grain.
description: A classic acoustic guitar with a light wood top, dark sides, and a smooth, semi-gloss finish. It features a round soundhole, dark bridge, and a headstock with six tuning pegs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the guitar's body, round soundhole, bridge, and the full length of the neck and headstock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the guitar's depth, curved body profile, and the length of the neck extending to the headstock.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the body, the neck, and the headstock with visible tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the guitar's body contour, neck, and headstock from a different angle.
attribute_headstock_design: Standard acoustic headstock with six tuning pegs, three on each side, no visible logo or distinctive cutouts.
